chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1946 of 2025 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of bail application 13.10.2025 Ms. Azra Hameed, advocate for applicant Mr. Khawaja Rauf Ahmed, advocate for complainant a/w complainant Mr. Zahoor Ahmed, APG O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant was arrested in present crime and offence on 19.09.2024 against the allegations of committing robbery of Rs.12,00,000/-from the complainant and his friend Abdul Waheed on 05.08.2024. He was put to identification parade and he was picked up by the complainant as one of the culprits. Subsequently, evidence of complainant has been recorded in the trial and it is stated that he has been identified. 2. Learned counsel for the complainant further submits that the trial is likely to be concluded within two months, which proposition is duly supported by the learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. 3. In the circumstances, this bail application is dismissed. The trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within two months, without fail, by examining all the necessary witnesses and by declining any request for adjournment made by either party This Cr. Bail Application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
